Rows.Description: there was no power to mechys showcase. when we reset the braker it kept of tripping. the wires in the 3 quarter inch pipe that goes under the floor melted we ran two new 2/20 lines title of 6 wires to restore power to the show case, each half of the show case is on its own 2/20 brakers.
we repaired the power to the outlet for the scale.
there was no power to the warming table, we found the short and repaired it to restore power.
